name: PBS Submit Job
summary: Generate safe PBS or OpenPBS batch scripts for common HPC job shapes.
description: This skill helps users create PBS, OpenPBS, or PBS Pro qsub scripts for CPU, MPI, GPU, and short smoke-test workloads with conservative defaults, clear placeholders, and notes about site-specific resource syntax.

tools.name: mpirun
tools.notes: MPI launch command varies by site; some PBS systems provide wrappers or use mpiexec.

inputs.name: project
inputs.description: Site-specific project, account, or allocation string used by local PBS policy.

inputs.name: queue
inputs.description: Target PBS queue or routing queue.

inputs.name: resources
inputs.description: Requested select chunks, CPUs, MPI ranks, memory, GPUs, wall time, and output paths.

outputs.name: pbs_script
outputs.description: A PBS qsub script that can be adapted and submitted after site review.

outputs.name: job_id
outputs.description: The job id printed by qsub after submission.

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced artifacts.
Check the CPU script shell syntax.
Run qsub with a short wall time on a test queue after replacing placeholders and confirming the local PBS resource syntax.

references.title: NASA HECC commonly used qsub options
